arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ. كَانَتِ الرِّحْلَةُ طَوِيلَةً وَلَكِنَّهَا مُرِيحَةٌ جِدّاً. اِنْتَظَرْتُ حَقِيبَتِي عِنْدَ مَكَانِ اسْتِلَامِ الْأَمْتِعَةِ. بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، رَكِبْتُ سَيَّارَةَ أُجْرَةٍ لِلذَّهَابِ إِلَى الْفُنْدُقِ. كَانَ السَّائِقُ لَطِيفاً وَتَحَدَّثَ مَعِي عَنْ مَعَالِمِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
translation: Stigao sam na aerodrom rano ujutro. Let je bio dug, ali veoma udoban. Čekao sam svoj kofer na mjestu za preuzimanje prtljaga. Nakon toga sam se taksijem odvezao do hotela. Vozač je bio ljubazan i razgovarao je sa mnom o znamenitostima grada.
translationEn: I arrived at the airport early in the morning. The flight was long but very comfortable. I waited for my bag at the baggage claim. After that, I took a taxi to go to the hotel. The driver was kind and talked to me about the city's landmarks.
